author: Crystal Carter
title: Crystal Carter on the LLM-SEO intersection, new SEO ideas, and reasoning models
content: Interview with Crystal Carter discussing the intersection of LLMs and SEO. Carter highlights how optimizations for LLMs can deliver significant visibility improvements independent of Google rankings, noting a 15% uplift in LLM visibility achieved within a week. The discussion covers reasoning models and their implications for SEO strategy, the shift from rankings to relevance, and why curiosity, experimentation, and cross-channel strategies matter in the evolving search landscape.
